title: eryngium dichotomum var. variifolium
intro: Eryngium dichotomum var. variifolium, commonly known as sea holly or sea eryngo, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Eryngium dichotomum var. variifolium include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. It can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
